heading: Definitions
label: 18601 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Department of Energy Research and Innovation Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out below and Tables.Pub. L. 115–246132 Stat. 3130Sept. 28, 2018

L. 115–246, § 1(a)132 Stat. 3130Sept. 28, 2018“This Act [see Short Title notes below and Tables for classification] may be cited as the ‘Department of Energy Research and Innovation Act’.”, , , provided that:Pub. children.heading: Department
children.label: 1 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Energy.

children.heading: Director
children.label: 2 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the Office of Science of the Department, except as otherwise indicated.

children.heading: National Laboratory
children.label: 3 National Laboratory
children.text: The term “National Laboratory” has the meaning given that term in .section 15801 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Energy.
